title: Implement CPU profiling instrumentation for voice latency measurement
description: Vision gap: 'CPU profiling / performance instrumentation for latency measurement absent' is marked MISSING. M88 (Voice Latency Benchmarking) is completed. Add CPU profiling instrumentation to measure STT+LLM+TTS pipeline bottlenecks. Can be as simple as performance.now() timing wrappers around key functions (stt.js transcribe, llm.js chat, tts.js synthesize) with a /api/profile endpoint returning timing data. This closes the last Vision missing gap toward ≥90%.
